title: Wire beskid_pckg submodule in compiler workspace

source.subject: Add beskid_pckg submodule for package management; update compiler and corelib submodules

body:
Adds **beskid_pckg** as a compiler submodule and bumps compiler/corelib submodule pointers for integrated package-management development.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`f26bc61`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/f26bc61)
- **Subject:** Add beskid_pckg submodule for package management; update compiler and corelib submodules
- **Completed:** 2026-03-18

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `corelib-packaging`

## Relation
Connects compiler workspace to **pckg** for manifest and pack flows.
